subject: A horned minotaur warrior charging forward through fire and smoke, wielding a blade, with burning ruins or temples visible in the background
description: A bull-headed minotaur warrior surges forward through a battlefield engulfed in flame and smoke. Heavy curling horns crown its head; its muscular humanoid frame is pitched into a charging stance. The palette is dominated by ember reds, oranges, and smoldering blacks, with bright flame highlights along the figure's silhouette. Behind the minotaur, the broken silhouettes of classical-Greek style temples or columns burn against a smoke-choked sky. The composition reads as kinetic, mid-action war imagery — a war leader in the midst of a sacking.
foreground: Charging horned minotaur warrior with weapon, lit by firelight
background: Burning Greek-style temple ruins, columns, smoke-filled sky
